name: system-design-advisor
description: AI skills for system design advising — answer questions, generate design plans, review architectures, and advise on design patterns using knowledge from The Engineer's Handbook (25 chapters).

skills.name: system-design-advisor
skills.description: Answer system design questions, explain tradeoffs, and provide architectural guidance on scalability, databases, caching, load balancing, CAP theorem, microservices, and distributed systems.

skills.name: design-plan-generator
skills.description: Generate step-by-step system design plans using a structured 4-step framework for any system design problem.

skills.name: architecture-reviewer
skills.description: Auto-scan and review project architecture against system design best practices, identifying bottlenecks and scalability issues.

skills.name: design-patterns-advisor
skills.description: Answer questions about GoF design patterns (creational, structural, behavioral), modern patterns, distributed patterns, and anti-patterns. Generates Mermaid diagrams showing pattern structure.

skills.name: pattern-implementation-guide
skills.description: Generate step-by-step implementation plans for applying design patterns to real problems, with language-specific code examples and class diagrams.

skills.name: code-pattern-reviewer
skills.description: Auto-scan project code for design pattern usage, anti-pattern violations, and improvement opportunities. Produces a findings table with severity ratings and pattern suggestions.
